creator: exploringlondon
caption:
It’s the half term holidays for a lot of kids right now and if you’re looking for things to do in London to keep them entertained, here’s a list of 8 things to do with kids! Lots of discount codes too 👇

1. @babylonparkldn - London’s underground theme park with a rollercoaster and arcade

2. @minecraftexperienceirl - an immersive and interactive Minecraft experience
🎟️ 10% off when you book on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

3. @prisonisland_experience.uk - try and work your way through 31 different rooms to escape and win points!
🎟️ 10% off when you book on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

4. @jurassicworldexperience - be transported to a time where dinosaurs roamed the earth in this immersive journey
🎟️ 10% off when you book on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

5. @banksylimitless - one of the largest collections of Banksy’s works with immersive rooms and interactive elements like designing your own T-shirt!
🎟️ 10% off when you book on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

6. @framelessldn - an immersive art gallery with interactive rooms and stunning art pieces bought to life

7. @spygamesofficial - go undercover as a spy and try different games that will make you run, jump andclimb as you try and score points 

8. @kedistudiolondon - a paint splatter experience where you can let loose and throw paint to create your very own masterpiece

#thingstodoinlondon #thingstodowithkids #londonkids #feverambassador
